name: camera_push_in
description: Dolly push from medium to close over the full shot. Decoupled from the composition layer's `push_in_hero` preset so it can be paired with OTHER compositions too (e.g. start at establishing-wide and push to three-quarter). Phase 5 ships the motion profile; V1.1 has a hardwired tracking cam that partially covers this — until Phase 5 lands, the layer sets the style hint and existing code handles the push.
